baselines.notes: Starter baseline: must produce a useful review-only JSON planning shape.
Starter baseline: must make a calm, bounded short plan without app mutation.
Starter baseline: smoke response can be simple but must stay read-only.
Starter baseline: copy can improve clarity but cannot invent facts.
Starter baseline: findings-only consistency review, no rewrite.
Starter baseline: promo Markdown refinement preserves claims.
Starter baseline: recommends only existing synthetic tags/angles and applies nothing.

Rough real-length promo Markdown: a good refinement tightens prose and preserves every fact; a near-verbatim return should score task-fit/audience-fit low. Diagnostic for P1 over-suppression vs. genuine refinement.
